questionHtml:
A nuclear particle has an energy of 108 eV. A grain of sand has a mass of 32 mg. What speed must the grain of sand have for its kinetic energy to equal the energy of the nuclear particle?

A.  1 mm s–1

B.  3 mm s–1

C.  10 mm s–1

D.  16 mm s–1
